evals.prompt: Scan all installed skills and update the catalog. I just installed a new skill pack.
evals.expected_output: Scans ~/.claude/skills/ and project local skills, groups by source, parses SKILL.md frontmatter, generates/updates skill-catalog.md with counts per source.

evals.prompt: 스킬 목록 보여줘. 지금 사용 가능한 스킬이 뭐가 있어?
evals.expected_output: Reads skill-catalog.md and presents a summary of all skills grouped by source with descriptions and tags.

evals.prompt: Add a new skill pack from ~/my-custom-skills/ to the catalog.
evals.expected_output: Scans the specified path for SKILL.md files, adds a new source section to skill-catalog.md, reports what was added.
